_purpose: Core page shortcuts shown in the 'Where to go next' grid on the onboarding page. page_id maps to GuiPage variants. Add new entries here when new pages should be promoted.

pages.label: Chat
pages.description: Talk to people building the same things you are. Encrypted, no account needed.

pages.label: Tasks
pages.description: Track your projects. Water system, garden, solar install, whatever you are working on.

pages.label: Maps
pages.description: Find community gardens, maker spaces, and resources near you.

pages.label: Market
pages.description: Trade surplus food, share tools, find local help.

pages.label: Notes
pages.description: Private encrypted journal. Document what works, what fails, what to try next.

pages.label: Profile
pages.description: Your name and skills. Let people know what you can teach or need help with.

pages.label: Wallet
pages.description: Optional. Send and receive payments without a bank. Not required.

pages.label: Settings
pages.description: Back up your identity, adjust the theme, configure notifications.
